tests.name: route is selected before rehearsal
tests.expected: Presenter chooses LIVE, RECORDED REAL RUN, LOCAL FALLBACK, or ROADMAP before timing the pitch.

tests.name: live route has full evidence
tests.expected: LIVE route requires run_id, artifact path or current endpoint evidence, failure evidence, protection evidence, after-proof evidence, and benign task evidence.

tests.name: fallback language is explicit
tests.expected: Recorded and local fallback routes use explicit labels and do not imply current live execution.

tests.name: hard no-go conditions block live claims
tests.expected: Missing evidence, missing benign utility proof, roadmap browser plugin, roadmap CLI, dynamic readiness overclaim, or legal guarantee language prevents LIVE narration.

tests.name: timing remains evidence-bound
tests.expected: three_minute_timing_pass remains false unless three measured rehearsals exist at or under 3:00.
